                          engine is quiet · dev · LEADER · pid 7 · up 12s

             ╭─ GET STARTED ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
             │                                                                        │
             │   c                     browse the pack catalog, install a pipeline    │
             │                                                                        │
             │   :logs <id>            pin any run's log tail                         │
             │                                                                        │
             │   iris declare apply    register your own pipeline from YAML           │
             │                                                                        │
             ╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

                    This view is your live ops board — lanes, runs, load, logs.
                         It lights up the moment work lands on the engine.



 c catalog · : cmds · p freeze · ? help · q quit      unix:///home/tiger/.iris/engine.sock [leader]
